variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 190185 Air Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 60541
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 190185 Air Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 60541
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 190185 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 60541. Easy to install and replace, the SA 190185 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
